'''âl-zh-f-dh''' ('''kalazhfedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weblish|weblish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weblish|weblish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-zh-f-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kalazhfedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilazhfedhoko|thilazhfedhoko]] || [[word:jilazhfedhoko|jilazhfedhoko]] || [[word:shilazhfedhoko|shilazhfedhoko]] || [[word:kilazhfedhoko|kilazhfedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulazhfedhoko|thuthulazhfedhoko]] || [[word:jujulazhfedhoko|jujulazhfedhoko]] || [[word:shushulazhfedhoko|shushulazhfedhoko]] || [[word:kukulazhfedhoko|kukulazhfedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholazhfedhoko|tholazhfedhoko]] || [[word:jolazhfedhoko|jolazhfedhoko]] || [[word:sholazhfedhoko|sholazhfedhoko]] || [[word:kolazhfedhoko|kolazhfedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
